sourceTitle: Generative AI Usage Guidelines | Information Technology Services Office
evidenceSnippetOriginal: Users are advised not to use confidential HKUST documents in those tools unless they are desensitized. Avoid inputting confidential, sensitive, or personal data into generative AI tools.
